title: Demo: smooth sequence switching experiment
description: Add a real-device demo to test smooth switching between sequences with two strategies: stitched single upload (deterministic) and live upload switching (experimental).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Started implementation: adding demo script + README instructions for stitched vs live switch playback experiments.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented demos/demo_sequence_switching.py with two strategies: stitched (single upload) and live (repeated uploads). Added resilient fallback when device rejects large CommandList payloads/timeouts. Verified both modes execute against real device IP from .env.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Tuned switching demo for real-device limits: added edge-hold frames (endpoint visibility), bounded stitched frame budget with auto-downsample, and default upload_mode=frame_by_frame for reliability. Re-ran stitched mode successfully.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Completed: sequence switching experiment validated on device, tuned for frame budget limits, and documented. Closing.
